messages.content: Is it possible to switch from Windows 10 LTSC 2015 to another version of Windows 10 without losing any userdata?

Yes, it is possible to switch from Windows 10 LTSC 2015 to another version of Windows 10 without losing any user data. However, it is important to note that the process may vary depending on the specific versions involved. Here are two general methods you can follow:

1. Upgrade Method: Microsoft provides a free upgrade path from one version of Windows 10 to another. You can use the Windows Update feature to check for and install the latest updates and versions of Windows 10. This typically retains all your files, settings, and applications. However, it's always recommended to create a backup of your important data before proceeding with any major system upgrade.

2. Fresh Installation Method: If the upgrade method is not possible or if you prefer a clean installation, you can perform a fresh installation of the new version of Windows 10. This involves creating a bootable USB drive or DVD with the new Windows 10 version, booting from it, and installing the new version from scratch. During the installation process, you will have the option to keep your personal files and applications, or perform a complete clean installation (which will erase all data on the system drive).

Regardless of the method you choose, it's always advisable to back up your important files before making any system changes to avoid any unforeseen data loss.
